macro.takeaway: The latest jobs report shows the economy is still adding jobs, which can keep interest rates higher for longer.

source.name: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (Employment Situation)

gold.takeaway: Gold stayed firm as investors balanced high interest rates against ongoing geopolitical uncertainty.

china.takeaway: China A-shares can be holiday-closed on some days, so this uses the US-listed ASHR ETF as a proxy for CSI 300 performance.

thailand.takeaway: Thailand stocks dipped on the week while the Bank of Thailand kept its policy rate at 1.00% to support growth.

us.takeaway: U.S. stocks ended the week higher while the Fed kept its rate at 3.5%–3.75%, so markets are still watching inflation and jobs for the next move.
